title: roman
body:
![peak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IhZIQDvv/images/37c8df8caddec1ece7cf6cab239b3354a8b0c71c.png)

# ROMAN IS HERE NOTHING WILL BE SAVE GOODBYE TO OUR PLANET
<details>
<summary>TexturePack Info</summary>

Roman is a texture pack that replaces a lot of blocks, entities, items and gui with my friend, roman

timofey - made all the textures from roman

roman - made roman.png(he gave me consent to publish this texture pack)

</details>

# AUTOMATIC REPORT No 6093
Corruption state: `Consuming`

Food and water: `Poisoned`

Creatures: `Partially consumed`

`1` New message:
```
we are one

we are roman
```

# AUTOMATIC REPORT No 6092
Corruption state: `Consuming`

Food and water: `Clean at base`

Creatures: `Some started evolution`

___

# REPORT No 76

It is too late.

___

# REPORT No 52
ROMAN was accidentally released from our storage unit

We haven't created any ways to neutralize the corruption so this might be a huge problem. Commander tells us we should relocate our base until we create a way to control it.

# ROMAN V6.9 - Biological weapon capable of mass destruction
Functions:

* Mass consumption of area with corruption spreading to some creatures, items and even blocks, like birch and diamonds

* Quick adaptation to new environments
